2256970.name: Ecto
2256970.description:
Ecto is a highly-randomized nature world that doesn't take itself too seriously. Your goal is to collect the star fragments which are scattered throughout the level... but that's not the main point of this game.

Along the way, you can click almost everything in the level for some sort of whimsical reaction.

Collect coins to buy peculiar trinkets from Froggieman's shop to mess around with.

You can even compete with yourself (or your friends) to set record speedrunning times between randomly placed islands.
